title: SEC1: age/scrypt pulled into wasm32 bundle unnecessarily
description: core/Cargo.toml: age is an unconditional dependency (not gated behind cfg(not(target_arch='wasm32'))). It is used only by keyfile.rs (which IS gated), but wallet.rs imports bip39/blake2b_simd unconditionally without using age. The age crate brings in scrypt (for passphrase-based encryption) — scrypt's WASM support is fragile and the whole dependency is useless in the browser (wallet is Phase 2+ and keyfile is gated). Cargo check currently passes but adding age features or a cargo update may trigger a compile failure. Fix: add [target.'cfg(not(target_arch="wasm32"))'.dependencies] gate for age in core/Cargo.toml.
